summary: Tested advanced scheduling options (ignore_priorities, ignore_priority_propagation, ignore_material_propagation). All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all 6 checkboxes working correctly in Options Avancées section.

minor.issue: When all ignore options enabled (especially ignore_calendars=True), scheduler returns NO_VALID_OPERATIONS with empty active_options. This is expected behavior but could be documented.

seed_data_creation: Created test scenarios: TEST_OPT_*, TEST_STORE_*, TEST_Advanced_Options_285161
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced scheduling options tested. Backend correctly reads and returns active_options in scheduling result. Frontend correctly sends options to backend. Integration verified with full scheduling flow.

1_ignore_priorities.description: Option ignore_priorities désactive les priorités des OF - tous traités également

2_ignore_priority_propagation.description: Option ignore_priority_propagation désactive la propagation de priorité vers fournisseurs

3_ignore_material_propagation.description: Option ignore_material_propagation désactive l'analyse des dépendances matière

4_active_options_in_result.description: Les options actives sont retournées dans le champ active_options du résultat

5_frontend_options_avancees_section.description: Le formulaire affiche les options dans la section Options Avancées

6_contraintes_appliquees_section.description: La section Contraintes Appliquées reflète les options cochées/décochées
6_contraintes_appliquees_section.notes: Section shows green checkmarks for enabled constraints, updates dynamically when options are toggled
